Title: Successful user registration with valid credentials
Preconditions:
- User is on the U-environment (homepage).
- No existing account with the provided email.
Test Data:
- First name: "John"
- Last name: "Doe"
- Email: "john.doe@example.com"
- Password: "SecurePass123!"
- Confirm password: "SecurePass123!"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Register activity** from U-environment.
2. Enter first name, last name, email, password, and confirm password.
3. Click "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System validates input (e.g., password match, valid email format).
- Account is created successfully.
- User is redirected to **Login activity** or **Profile** activity with a confirmation message.

Title: Registration failure with invalid email format
Test Data:
- First name: "John"
- Last name: "Doe"
- Email: "john.doe@example" (missing @domain)
- Password: "Pass123"
- Confirm password: "Pass123"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Register activity**.
2. Enter invalid email and other valid fields.
3. Click "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects registration with an error: *"Invalid email format."*
- User remains on the registration page with highlighted invalid field.

Title: Registration failure with mismatched passwords
Test Data:
- First name: "Jane"
- Last name: "Smith"
- Email: "jane.smith@example.com"
- Password: "Password1"
- Confirm password: "password1" (case mismatch)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Register activity**.
2. Enter fields with mismatched passwords.
3. Click "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays error: *"Passwords do not match."*
- User remains on the registration page.

Title: Successful login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Login activity** from U-environment.
2. Enter valid email and password.
3. Click "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- User is authenticated and redirected to **Profile** or **U-environment** (homepage).
- No error messages appear.

Title: Login failure with incorrect password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Login activity**.
2. Enter correct email and incorrect password.
3. Click "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays error: *"Invalid email or password."*
- User remains on the login page.

Title: Login failure with non-existent email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Login activity**.
2. Enter non-existent email and any password.
3. Click "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays error: *"Invalid email or password."*
- User remains on the login page.

Title: Successful event creation with valid details
Test Data:
- Event name: "Tech Conference 2023"
- Description: "Annual tech conference with keynote speakers."
- Date: "2023-12-15"
- Time: "09:00 AM"
- Location: "New York Convention Center"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Create event** from U-environment.
2. Fill in all event details.
3. Click "Create Event" button.
Expected Result:
- Event is created successfully.
- User is redirected to **Join/View event** with a confirmation message.
- Event appears in the system under **Gestione di dati del progetto**.

Title: Event creation failure with missing required field
Test Data:
- Event name: "" (empty)
- Description: "Conference"
- Date: "2023-12-15"
- Time: "09:00 AM"
- Location: "Convention Center"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Create event**.
2. Leave "Event name" field empty; fill in other fields.
3. Click "Create Event" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays error: *"Event name is required."*
- User remains on the event creation page with the empty field highlighted.

Title: Successful event joining by authenticated user
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Event "Tech Conference 2023" exists (created via TC-EVENT-001).
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Join/View event** from U-environment.
2. Search for and select "Tech Conference 2023".
3. Click "Join Event" button.
Expected Result:
- User is added to the event participants list.
- System displays confirmation: *"You have successfully joined the event."*
- Event details now show the user as a participant in **Gestione di dati del progetto**.

Title: Event joining failure by unauthenticated user
Preconditions:
- User is **not** logged in.
- Event "Tech Conference 2023" exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Join/View event** from U-environment.
2. Attempt to join "Tech Conference 2023" without logging in.
Expected Result:
- System redirects to **Login activity** with message: *"Please log in to join an event."*
- User cannot join the event until authenticated.

Title: Successful profile update with valid data
Test Data:
- Current phone: "+1234567890"
- New phone: "+1987654321"
- Current address: "123 Old St"
- New address: "456 New Ave"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Profile** from U-environment.
2. Update phone number and address fields.
3. Click "Save Changes" button.
Expected Result:
- Profile updates successfully.
- System displays confirmation: *"Profile updated successfully."*
- Changes reflect in **Gestione di dati del progetto**.

Title: Profile update failure with invalid phone format
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Profile**.
2. Enter invalid phone and valid address.
3. Click "Save Changes".
Expected Result:
- System displays error: *"Invalid phone number format."*
- User remains on the profile page with the invalid field highlighted.

Title: Successful newsletter subscription
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Newsletter activity** from U-environment.
2. Enter email and click "Subscribe".
Expected Result:
- User is subscribed to the newsletter.
- System displays confirmation: *"You have subscribed successfully."*
- Email is added to the newsletter list in **Newsletter management**.

Title: Newsletter subscription failure with invalid email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Newsletter activity**.
2. Enter invalid email and click "Subscribe".
Expected Result:
- System displays error: *"Invalid email format."*
- User remains on the newsletter page.

Title: Successful newsletter content management (admin)
Preconditions: - User has admin privileges (assumed for this test).
Test Data:
- Newsletter title: "Weekly Updates"
- Content: "Hello users, here are your weekly updates..."
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Newsletter management** from U-environment.
2. Create a new newsletter entry with title and content.
3. Click "Publish".
Expected Result:
- Newsletter is published successfully.
- Entry appears in the **Newsletter activity** for subscribers.
- Data is stored in **Gestione di dati del progetto**.

Title: Display of flash activity notifications
Preconditions: - System has at least one flash notification (e.g., "System maintenance scheduled").
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Flash activity** from U-environment.
2. Observe displayed notifications.
Expected Result:
- Flash notifications are displayed in chronological order.
- Notifications are cleared after viewing or after a timeout (e.g., 5 seconds).
- **Notification center** logs the display event.

Title: Successful application exit
Preconditions: - User is logged in or on any activity.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Exit** from U-environment or any activity.
2. Confirm exit if prompted.
Expected Result:
- Application closes gracefully.
- User session is terminated (no active sessions in **Gestione di dati del progetto**).
- No data loss occurs.

Title: Project data retrieval and validation
Preconditions: - System contains sample data (e.g., 3 events, 5 users).
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Gestione di dati del progetto** (admin/background access).
2. Query for all events and users.
Expected Result:
- Data is retrieved without errors.
- All events/users match expected counts (3 events, 5 users).
- Data integrity is maintained (e.g., no orphaned records).

Title: Project data corruption handling
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a data corruption scenario (e.g., manually alter a record in the database).
2. Attempt to retrieve corrupted data via **Gestione di dati del progetto**.
Expected Result:
- System detects corruption and displays an error: *"Data inconsistency detected. Contact support."*
- Affected record is quarantined or flagged for review.
- **Notification center** alerts admin of the issue.

Title: End-to-end flow: Register → Create Event → Join Event
